title: main.c LED diagnostic patterns documented only in file header
description:
main.c lines 5-10 document LED diagnostic patterns:

```c
/*
 * LED diagnostic patterns (led0 alias, if present):
 * - Solid on during init: normal startup in progress
 * - 3 rapid blinks (100ms on/off): USB CDC initialization failed
 * - Continuous 200ms blink (forever): standalone LoRa init failed
 * - Off after init: ready, normal operation
 */
```

But the implementation at lines 137-144 (USB failure) and lines 164-175 (LoRa failure) have no inline comments referencing this pattern table.

What goes wrong: A maintainer changing the blink pattern must remember to update both locations. The patterns are also not visible to a user debugging a device - they'd need the source code.

Improvement: Add inline comments at each LED code block referencing the header comment, e.g., '/* USB CDC failure: 3 rapid blinks (see file header) */'. Consider also logging the pattern meaning before entering the blink loop.
